name: UN Basic Principles and Guidelines on Development-Based Evictions and Displacement
use: Due process, consultation, notice, remedies, relocation, and proportionality checks.

name: African Charter on Human and Peoples' Rights
use: Dignity, property, family, development, fair process, and peoples' rights framing.

name: Land Use Act 1978
use: Governor-held land administration, occupancy rights, revocation and compensation review.

name: Lagos State Urban and Regional Planning and Development Law 2010
use: Planning permit, development control, building control, and urban regeneration compliance review.
